Description: Unique 6-digit code identifying the Census tract.
Full federal tract identifier (state + county + tract).
Reporting year of the dataset.
City or jurisdiction associated with the tract.
Public Use Microdata Area for ACS/PUMS analysis.
Number of actual property sales in tract and year.
Actual median sale price from matched sales for tract/year. NaN if no sales recorded.
Final tract median sale price. Uses actual median where observed; otherwise imputed from ACS home values/incomes, LODES job metrics, and neighboring-year sale prices.
Actual median price per square foot from sales.
Actual median size (square feet) of sold homes.
Actual median bedroom count of sold homes.
Actual median bathroom count of sold homes.
Median household income for previous year.
Median home value for tract, adjusted from ACS 5-year estimates.
Median gross rent for tract, adjusted from ACS 5-year estimates.
Total population in tract.
Total households in tract.
Average household size.
Median age of persons in tract.
Population density (persons per square kilometer of land).
Housing unit density (units per square kilometer of land).
Estimated Very Low-Income cutoff in dollars based on HCD income limits.
Estimated Low-Income cutoff in dollars based on HCD income limits.
Estimated Moderate-Income cutoff in dollars based on HCD income limits.
Proportion of households in Very Low-Income category.
Proportion of households in Low-Income category.
Proportion of households in Moderate-Income category.
Proportion of households in Above Moderate-Income category.
Overall tract income category classification based on ACS/HCD data.
Ratio of actual median sale price to median household income.
Source: Calculated from Property transactions and ACS

Description: Ratio of ACS-imputed home value to median household income.
Proportion of persons with income below the poverty level.
Proportion of persons aged 60 or older.
Unemployment rate for the labor force.
Proportion of workers with commute time over 45 minutes.
Total housing units in tract.
Total housing units in Builder's Remedy projects in tract.
Builder's Remedy units as a percent of existing housing units.
Source: Calculated from HCD APR and ACS

Description: Total housing units proposed in development pipeline.
Number of development submissions (projects) in tract.
Proposed units as a percent of existing housing units.
Source: Calculated from HCD APR and ACS

Description: Percent of proposed units that were approved.
Land area of tract in square kilometers.
Total jobs located in tract (workplace area).
Number of high-wage jobs located in tract (LODES high-wage category).
Number of professional and technical jobs in tract.
Number of finance sector jobs in tract.
Number of information sector jobs in tract.
Number of manufacturing jobs in tract.
Number of retail jobs in tract.
Number of healthcare jobs in tract.
High-wage jobs as a percent of total jobs.
Professional/tech jobs as a percent of total jobs.
White-collar jobs as a percent of total jobs.
Jobs per resident (Total jobs / Persons_Total).
Source: Calculated from LODES WAC and ACS

Description: Jobs per housing unit (Total jobs / Housing_Units_Total).
Source: Calculated from LODES WAC and ACS

Description: Job density (jobs per square kilometer).
Total resident workers living in tract.
Resident workers in high-wage jobs (LODES high-wage category).
Resident workers in professional/tech occupations.
Proportion of resident workers in high-wage jobs.
Proportion of resident workers in professional/tech jobs.
Ratio of workplace jobs to resident workers (jobs-housing balance indicator).
Source: Calculated from LODES WAC and RAC

Description: Ratio of resident high-wage workers to workplace high-wage jobs (proxy for local economic capture).
Source: Calculated from LODES WAC and RAC

Description: Ratio of resident tech workers to workplace tech jobs.
Source: Calculated from LODES WAC and RAC

Description: Employment rate among tract residents.
Source: Calculated from LODES RAC and ACS
